message:
feat(fcp-cli): add recovery_hint field to ExplainReport

Add optional recovery_hint to ExplainReport for agent-facing guidance
on how to recover from denied operations:

- ExplainReport.recovery_hint: Option<String> with skip_serializing_if
- Sourced from FcpErrorResponse.ai_recovery_hint on denial responses
- Rendered in human-readable output with textwrap formatting
- Demo receipts include recovery hints for revocation and zone violations
- Test: load_receipt_from_json_error_response_preserves_recovery_hint
  verifies round-trip through file serialization
- All existing report construction sites updated with recovery_hint: None

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
